ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sequences" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence */,
  "sequence_name" TEXT /* Name of the sequence */,
  "sequence_type" TEXT /* Type of sequence (e.g., DNA, RNA, protein) */,
  "sequence_data" TEXT /* Actual sequence data */,
  "sequence_format" TEXT /* Format of the sequence (e.g., FASTA, GenBank) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sequence (e.g., public database, internal lab) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the sequence was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the sequence data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the sequence */,
  "accession_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier from public databases (e.g., NCBI accession number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alignments" (
  "alignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alignment */,
  "query_sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query sequence */,
  "subject_sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject sequence */,
  "identity" REAL /* Percentage of sequence identity */,
  "alignment_length" INTEGER /* Length of the alignment */,
  "mismatches" INTEGER /* Number of mismatches */,
  "gap_opens" INTEGER /* Number of gap openings */,
  "q_start" INTEGER /* Start position of the query sequence */,
  "q_end" INTEGER /* End position of the query sequence */,
  "s_start" INTEGER /* Start position of the subject sequence */,
  "s_end" INTEGER /* End position of the subject sequence */,
  "evalue" REAL /* E-value of the alignment */,
  "bit_score" REAL /* Bit score of the alignment */,
  "alignment_tool" TEXT /* Name of the tool used for the alignment */,
  "alignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the alignment was performed */,
  "alignment_version" TEXT /* Version of the alignment tool used */,
  "alignment_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the alignment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the alignment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the alignment was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the alignment data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alignments_subject_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alignments_query_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Securely stored password hash for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission association */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
